n: Book 8, Chapter 1: War-steeds from the Wold

steps.t: Your companions have obtained war-steeds of their own, and are waiting to speak with you in Harwick, by the tourney ground near the stables.
Enstan is by the south-east exit of Harwick, in the Wold. Your companions have war-steeds of their own and now you have heard that Enstan wants your h…
